_note: Sample hooks.json for aidd-context plugin (preview — aidd-context plugin not yet created in Phase 0). This file documents the expected format for plugins/aidd-context/hooks/hooks.json.

_claude_native_hooks_format.description: When installed into Claude Code, hooks from hooks/hooks.json are translated to the Claude settings.json hooks format.
_claude_native_hooks_format.installed_output: Written to ~/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json hooks block

hooks._description: Syncs aidd_project_memory block in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/.github/copilot-instructions.md at session start. Migrated from config/scripts/update_memory.js.

cursor.format: Same structure as Claude hooks — cursor acceptsHooks: true
cursor.note: Cursor hooks format may differ — verify against cursor documentation when implementing aidd-context

codex.note: Codex PluginsCapability does not currently accept hooks (acceptsHooks: false or mode: unsupported). Verify when implementing aidd-context.

copilot.note: Copilot does not support hooks in current CLI implementation

_cli_handling.capability_check: PluginsCapability.acceptsHooks must be true for the tool (claude: true, cursor: true)
_cli_handling.translation: Hooks from plugin are merged into tool's hooks configuration at plugin add time
